title: Better Hub Icon Theme Manifest
description: Schema for the better-hub-extension.json manifest file when publishing an icon theme to the Better Hub marketplace.

$schema.description: URL or relative path to this JSON schema for editor validation.

name.description: Display name of the icon theme. Alphanumeric characters, underscores, hyphens, and spaces only.

description.description: A short description of the icon theme shown in the marketplace.

version.description: Semantic version of the extension (e.g. "1.0.0"). Defaults to "1.0.0" if omitted.

type.description: Must be "icon-theme" for icon theme extensions.

main.description: Relative path from the repo root to the icon mapping JSON data file (e.g. "icons/icon-theme.json").

icon.description: Relative path from the repo root to an icon/logo image for the marketplace listing (e.g. "icon.png").

examples.name: My Icon Theme
examples.description: A beautiful file icon theme for Better Hub
